args.sql: SELECT teigid, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom,4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM teig WHERE kommunenummer = '0301' AND teigid IN (SELECT teigid FROM teig WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, (SELECT ST_Union(geom_geojson) FROM flomareal WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200))) LIMIT 10;
